visuals.title: Circular Singly Linked List Structure
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Circular Singly Linked List Structure
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Circular Singly Linked List</text>

  <!-- Circular linked list visualization -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="150" r="100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,5" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>

  <!-- Node 1 -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="80" r="25" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="83" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    A
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Node 2 -->
  <circle cx="280" cy="130" r="25" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="280" y="133" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    B
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Node 3 -->
  <circle cx="250" cy="210" r="25" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="250" y="213" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    C
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Node 4 -->
  <circle cx="170" cy="210" r="25" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="170" y="213" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    D
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Node 5 -->
  <circle cx="140" cy="130" r="25" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="140" y="133" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    E
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from A to B -->
  <path d="M225 95 C240 100, 260 110, 270 120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrow from B to C -->
  <path d="M290 140 C285 160, 275 185, 260 200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrow from C to D -->
  <path d="M240 220 C220 220, 195 220, 180 215" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrow from D to E -->
  <path d="M160 210 C150 190, 145 160, 145 140" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrow from E to A (completing the circle) -->
  <path d="M135 115 C130 100, 150 85, 195 85" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Head pointer -->
  <polygon points="210,40 200,55 220,55" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  <text x="210" y="35" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Head
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Explanation text -->
  <text x="210" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Last node points back to first node instead of NULL
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>

nodes.label: If list empty: new node points to itself
Else: find last node (points to current first)
Set last node's next to new node
Set new node's next to current first node
Update head to point to new node
